original_image_tags: NASA logo (vector graphic of a blue circle with a chevron and stars, though rendered in black and white) positioned next to the text "NATIONAL AERONAUTICS AND SPACE ADMINISTRATION". A vertical textured strip runs down the left side of the page.
Logo of the Manned Spacecraft Center, consisting of a stylized globe with an orbital ring and a star, positioned to the left of the center name.

elements.description: A circular NASA 'meatball' logo containing the text 'NASA' and a stylized red swoosh. It is positioned on a vertical, patterned, dark gray rectangular strip on the left side of the page.
A circular logo at the bottom left featuring a stylized planet with intersecting orbital lines and an arrow pointing right. The design is black and white.

judge.reason: Description A states the NASA logo text is 'NATIONAL AERONAUTICS AND SPACE ADMINISTRATION' while Description B quotes it as 'NASA', a direct contradiction on specific quoted text within the same visual element.
